name: Konohanasakuya
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>木花咲弥</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>コノハナサクヤ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by controlling a Spirit monster. You can only Special Summon "Konohanasakuya" once per turn this way. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Special Summoned this turn: Return it to the hand. Once per turn, during the End Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Spirit monster you control; neither player can activate that face-up monster's effects on the field for the rest of this turn.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by controlling a Spirit monster. You can only Special Summon "Konohanasakuya" once per turn this way. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Special Summoned this turn: Return it to the hand. Once per turn, during the End Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Spirit monster you control; neither player can activate that face-up monster's effects on the field for the rest of this turn.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by controlling a Spirit monster. You can only Special Summon "Konohanasakuya" once per turn this way. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Special Summoned this turn: Return it to the hand. Once per turn, during the End Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Spirit monster you control; neither player can activate that face-up monster's effects on the field for the rest of this turn.

eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition, Condition, Trigger, Trigger
action: Activates during the turn in which it was Special Summoned
Returns itself from field to hand
mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster type
